ideas.title: tip splitter
ideas.description: bill amount, tip %, number of people. show per-person clearly.

ideas.title: metronome
ideas.description: tap-tempo metronome with a soft visual pulse. BPM display. start/stop toggle.

ideas.title: stopwatch
ideas.description: elegant stopwatch with lap times. minimal chrome.

ideas.title: countdown
ideas.description: countdown timer; tap the number to set; pause/reset. soft chime at zero (visual flash only).

ideas.title: unit converter
ideas.description: small unit converter — one category (length OR temperature OR weight). dial-style picker.

ideas.title: decision wheel
ideas.description: type 2-6 options, spin a wheel to pick one. soft easing.

ideas.title: world clock
ideas.description: three timezones at once, picked from a short curated list. soft circle around the active one.

ideas.title: rpn calculator
ideas.description: a tiny RPN calculator. stack visible. four functions plus enter.

ideas.title: qr-like grid
ideas.description: type a short string, render a deterministic pixel-grid signature for it. not a real QR, just a visual hash.

ideas.title: color hex picker
ideas.description: three sliders (H, S, L) producing a swatch and hex code. tap hex to copy (visual feedback only).

ideas.title: password phrase
ideas.description: generate a 4-word memorable passphrase from a small word list. tap to regenerate.
